title: Salty Juicy Vanilla Bean Stir-fry
description: A midnight-craving Ukrainian dish featuring vanilla beans for a unique twist, simmered to perfection and suitable for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: Vanilla beans
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh or vanilla-flavored extract for those without access to real beans.

ingredients.name: Pork belly or tofu
ingredients.notes: For a more substantial meal, use pork belly. For vegetarian option, replace with firm tofu.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for best flavor integration.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced to add depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Cornstarch or corn flour
ingredients.notes: For thickening the sauce if desired.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Choose soy sauce based on personal preference and dietary needs.

ingredients.name: Water or broth
ingredients.notes: Use any liquid to deglaze the pan after stir-frying.

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil or ghee
ingredients.notes: For searing and cooking vegetables, for added flavor if desired.

instructions: Gently heat a wok over medium-high heat and add the vegetable oil.
Add onion and garlic to the heated wok, stir-fry until softened but not browned.
If using pork belly, sear it on all sides in the wok; if using tofu, press out excess water then lightly pan-sear until golden.
Add soy sauce (or tamari), cornstarch, and enough liquid to deglaze the pan. Stir until thickened slightly.
Fold in vanilla beans along with any juices from them into the vegetables and meat/tofu mixture.
Stir-fry everything together for another 2-3 minutes until combined and heated evenly.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course, optionally garnished with fresh mint leaves.
